tags.description: Typography scale/weight hierarchy causes readability debt.
Inconsistent spacing rhythm across sections/components.
Color system does not communicate hierarchy and trust clearly.
Too many same-weight cards causing scanning fatigue.
Primary CTA is unclear, low prominence, or under-specified.
No clear single next best action above fold.
Multiple competing actions with similar visual weight.
Navigation/path intent unclear to first-time homeowner.
Tabs behave as redirects or differ across routes.
Route diverges from designated template family.
Route uses ad-hoc styles outside governed token set.
Loading/error/empty/offline/success states are weak or inconsistent.
Recommendations shown without enough trust context.
Confidence level not visible where decisions are made.
Source/provenance missing for claims or recommendations.
Data recency/timestamp not visible.
Why this recommendation appears is unclear.
Assumptions/limitations are hidden or inaccessible.
Mobile viewport overloaded with dense content.
Sticky/fixed/chat layers compete or obscure critical actions.
Touch targets below ergonomic threshold.
Desktop table patterns leak into mobile.
Drawer/modal choice creates confusion or dead-ends.
Forms too long or cognitively taxing without guidance.
Empty states fail to guide user to meaningful next step.
Error handling lacks actionable recovery path.
Internal/technical wording is homeowner-unfriendly.
Tone lacks calm reassurance and outcome orientation.
Report route overwhelms decision-making with dense detail.
Comparison flow increases decision burden instead of reducing it.
Funnel route leaks trust and lowers conversion quality.
Route likely harms acquisition/diligence perception.
